---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Publications — Seth Watts"
page-layout: full

listing:
  - id: articles
    contents: "articles/*/index.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    page-size: 100
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [date, title, subtitle]

date-format: "YYYY"
---

<div class="page-hero-slim">

<p class="hero-affiliation" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Research</p>
<h1>Publications</h1>
<p>Compiled automatically from <a href="https://openalex.org/" target="_blank">OpenAlex</a> via ORCID. Updated biweekly.</p>

</div>

::: {#articles}
:::
